payload.text: we wnat ot buinld a landinga page for a made in india Drone paltfom on this theme whci will further og in a ecom page also where we can buy  drones and also generate iamegs throguh gemini for it make make the iamges permanet

**Designing the Landing Page**

I'm now focusing on designing the landing page for the "Made in India" drone platform. The theme is a dark, gritty Battlefield-inspired aesthetic with high contrast black and gold. I'm exploring layouts that emphasize the military/tech feel while ensuring the drone platform's key features are clearly presented. The goal is to create a compelling visual experience.


**Defining Key Components**

I've got the e-commerce component and Gemini image generation in mind now. The visual direction is cemented: Battlefield-esque, with a dark backdrop, gold accents, aggressive typography, and those tech overlays. My tech stack is set: React with Tailwind, and the Gemini API. I’m thinking about the Navbar, Hero section with a strong visual, the Features section, Shop, AI Lab interface, and a Footer.

payload.text: add featurs also in the ladnign page as liek as a DJi drone

**Considering Landing Page Design**

I'm currently focused on the "Features" section for the IND-DRONE landing page. I'm thinking about making it similar to a DJI drone's feature display. I need to analyze the current code. I'm considering Hero as a starting point.


**Developing Feature Presentation**

I've decided to incorporate the "Features" section directly into the `landing` view within `App.tsx`. The plan is coming together: I'll focus on the typical DJI-style feature list, covering camera capabilities, obstacle avoidance, flight time, tracking, transmission, and the drone's design. I'm keeping the industrial gold/black color scheme and will use high-quality placeholder images. Technical HUD-like styling will add that extra edge, and animation on scroll will be nice. Grid layouts will be the best for presenting the specs.

entries.description: Added a high-end features section inspired by DJI landing pages, showcasing technical capabilities with HUD-style design.

diffs.replacement:
import React from 'react'; const Features: React.FC = () => { const mainFeatures = [ { title: "IRIS-360™ SENSING", subtitle: "Omnidirectional Obstacle Avoidance", description: "Equipped with 8 high-resolution vision sensors and a high-performance computing engine, the IRIS-360 system maps environments in real-time, ensuring zero-collision flight in the densest urban or forest terrains.", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504890001746-a9a68eda46e2?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=1200", tag: "SAFETY" }, { title: "VAYU-OPTICS 8K", subtitle: "Full-Frame Tactical Imaging", description: "A dual-camera system featuring a 1-inch CMOS sensor and a specialized thermal array. Capture cinematic 8K video or perform precision night reconnaissance with up to 28x hybrid zoom.", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1524143986875-3b098d78b363?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=1200", tag: "IMAGING" }, { title: "AKASH LINK V4", subtitle: "Ultra-Long Range Transmission", description: "Proprietary frequency-hopping technology developed in India, providing a lag-free 1080p/60fps live feed from up to 20km away, even in high-interference environments.", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1533560224123-70d1345da555?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=1200", tag: "SIGNAL" } ]; const gridSpecs = [ { label: "Flight Time", value: "46 MINS", detail: "Atal-Battery Tech" }, { label: "Wind Resistance", value: "LEVEL 7", detail: "Up to 15 m/s" }, { label: "Max Speed", value: "75 KM/H", detail: "In Sport Mode" }, { label: "Internal Storage", value: "1 TB", detail: "SSD Integration" }, ]; return (
{/* Tech Specs Banner */}
{gridSpecs.map((spec, i) => (

{spec.label}

{spec.value}

{spec.detail}

))}
{/* Feature Sections */}
{mainFeatures.map((feature, index) => (
{/* HUD Overlay on image */}
{feature.tag} ACTIVE
Advanced Capability

{feature.title.split(' ')[0]}
{feature.title.split(' ')[1]}

{feature.subtitle}

{feature.description}

))}
{/* Cinematic Call to Action */}

READY FOR DEPLOYMENT?

Join the elite circle of pilots advancing Indian aerospace.

); }; export default Features;
